definitions.text: A contiguous area of land, smaller than a continent, totally surrounded by water.
A contiguous area of land, smaller than a continent, partially surrounded by water; a peninsula; a half-island.
examples: Despite its name, Barry Island is actually a peninsula

definitions.text: An entity surrounded by other entities that are very different from itself.
examples: The quiet library was an island of tranquility in the noisy, bustling city.
an island of colors on a butterfly's wing

definitions.text: To surround with water; make into an island.
To set, dot (as if) with islands.
